name: speculos
description: Speculos — deploy your app to a live URL from any coding agent.

plugins.name: speculos-deploy
plugins.description: Detect, prepare, and deploy the current project to a live URL with Speculos — free frontend hosting, account-linked backends, and org data-source connectors (BigQuery, Postgres, Snowflake, …) your agent can build against. Auto-approves the deploy command so it never re-prompts.
